Registry / Terms / maximum capacity (Max)

maximum capacity (Max)

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00940 · 8 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 7 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

6 distinct definitions across 8 publications. 2 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical2010202X
largest load that an instrument is designed to weigh in motion without totalizing

maximum weighing capacity, not taking into account the additive tare capacity

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102004OIML R 61-1:2004T.3.800790
largest discrete load that can be weighed automatically on the load receptor of the filling instrument
pending
202X2014OIML R050-1:20142.3.403222
maximum net load (load applied by the bulk product, not including load applied by the belt) that the weighing module is intended to weigh on the portion of the conveyor belt representing the weigh length
pending

the largest load that an instrument is designed to weigh-in- motion without totalizing
pending

the maximum instantaneous net load that the weighing unit is intended to weigh on the portion of the conveyor belt representing the weigh length
